headline: Tesla Rings Fourth Of July With $1,000 Discount For Military Personnel On New EV Purchases
summary: Tesla Inc is offering $1000 off on Model 3, Y, S, X for military personnel. Program aims to boost sales as it dropped in Q2 but CEO remains optimistic.

headline: Mustang Mach-E Drives Ford's Q2 EV Sales Ahead Of GM But It's Still Just A Fraction Of Elon Musk's Tesla
summary: Ford sold 23,957 EVs in Q2 in the U.S., surpassing GM but trailing behind Tesla. Best-selling Mustang Mach-E draws new customers while cheaper prices fail to boost overall sales compared to Tesla.

headline: Amazon Secures $2B Cloud Deal With Australia's Spy Agency To Shift Intelligence Data On AWS
summary: Australia's top-secret intelligence data will be migrated to the cloud under a $2 billion deal with Amazon.com Inc's cloud service Amazon Web Services. This decision is expected to enhance the country's defense force interoperability with the United States.

headline: Nissan And Honda Play Tesla Catchup — Considering EV Charging Tie-Up To Boost Competitiveness

summary: The parent company of Saks Fifth Avenue has reportedly agreed to acquire its rival Neiman Marcus for $2.65 billion. The deal, which is expected to be announced imminently, will see the involvement of Amazon.com Inc.

headline: Top Apple Executive Phil Schiller To Join OpenAI Board As Observer, Giving iPhone Maker Equal Status With Microsoft After Landmark AI Agreement Reached: Report
summary: Apple is set to secure an observer role on the board of ChatGPT-parent OpenAI, appointing Phil Schiller, a move that parallels Microsoft's position and aims to provide Apple with insights into OpenAI's decision-making process.
